narrative:
Precinct Urbana 2-A (precinct in Champaign County) has 1,123 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.0%, a clear Republican lean of 10.2 percentage points.
